title: Deterministic replay — event log persistence and CLI
purpose: Event logs need to be saved to disk and loaded for later replay. A CLI tool allows operators to record production runs and replay them locally for debugging.
task: Implement event log persistence and a replay CLI.

requirements.title: Event log file format
requirements.spec: Persist event logs to a compact binary file format.
acceptance: Save: ReplayLog::save(path) writes the log to disk
Load: ReplayLog::load(path) reads a log from disk
Format is versioned (format_version field) for forward compatibility
Test: save, load, verify identical events

requirements.title: beamr-cli replay command
requirements.spec: Add a replay subcommand to beamr-cli.
acceptance: beamr replay <log-file> replays the event log
beamr record <beam-file> --entry m:f/a --log <output> records a run
Replay prints the same output as the original run
Exit code matches the original run
Test: record a run, replay it, verify identical output

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement log streaming (live recording to remote) — file-based only
SHALL NOT implement log merging (combining logs from multiple runs)
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with all tests green
